title: ophrys fusca subsp. flammeola
intro: Ophrys fusca subsp. flammeola, also known as the yellow bee orchid, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ophrys fusca subsp. flammeola include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
